## Summary

Describe the change and the application problem it solves.

## Compatibility

Describe API, parsing, SQL, encoding, ordering, or migration impact.

## Security considerations

Describe entropy, cryptographic, secret-handling, parser, and authorization assumptions.

## Validation

- [ ] `gofmt` produces no changes
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] legacy hash dependency check passes
- [ ] regression tests were added
- [ ] README or package documentation was updated
